text: Pro tier customers may request a refund within 14 days of purchase
Standard shipping for physical merchandise ships within three business days of order confirmation
To reset a forgotten password, visit account.example.com/reset and enter the email on file
Enterprise plans require two-factor authentication on every login, enforced at the SSO layer
Checkout accepts payment in USD, EUR, and GBP, with prices displayed in the browser's preferred currency
API rate limits are enforced per API key, with a sliding 60-second window and a default budget of 100 requests
All account data can be exported from the dashboard under Settings then Data, as either JSON or CSV
The primary application database is hosted in AWS us-east-1, with read replicas in us-west-2 and eu-west-1
The Free tier is free; the Pro tier costs 29 dollars per month per seat and adds higher API limits
The status page publishes a real-time uptime number across all regions, sitting between 99.95 and 99.99 percent over the trailing year
